carWorkflow.title: CAR Verification Workflow
carWorkflow.description: Review citizen address declarations that require manual verification. Addresses referencing verified UACs are automatically approved.
carWorkflow.accessDenied: Access denied. You need CAR review permissions to access this workflow.
carWorkflow.allAddressesProcessed: All citizen address declarations have been auto-processed or reviewed.

autoApprovalProcess.title: CAR Verification Process with Auto-Approval
autoApprovalProcess.description: How the streamlined verification system works
autoApprovalProcess.automaticProcessingDescription: Citizen declarations referencing verified UACs are automatically approved. This reduces administrative burden while maintaining data integrity.
autoApprovalProcess.step1Description: System checks if declared UAC exists in verified addresses. If so, auto-approves.
autoApprovalProcess.step2Description: Only declarations with unknown or unverified UACs require manual review.
autoApprovalProcess.step3Description: Manually review remaining declarations and make confirm/reject decisions.
autoApprovalProcess.step4Description: All actions (automatic and manual) are logged for compliance and auditing.
autoApprovalProcess.benefit2: Maintains data integrity through verified UAC validation
autoApprovalProcess.benefit3: Provides complete audit trail for all actions
autoApprovalProcess.benefit4: Focuses manual review on genuinely uncertain cases
